channel.title: Cariboo Signals
channel.copyright: © 2026 Erich Zirnhelt. Licensed under CC BY-NC 4.0.
channel.itunes:subtitle: Technology and society in rural BC with Riley and Casey
channel.itunes:author: Riley and Casey
channel.itunes:summary: How do rural communities grow alongside technology? Daily conversations about responsible tech progress in the Cariboo region on the traditional territories of the Secwépemc, Tŝilhqot'in, and Dakelh nations. Riley brings tech systems thinking with rural roots, while Casey focuses on community development. New episodes every day with weekly themes.
channel.description: How do rural communities grow alongside technology? Daily conversations about responsible tech progress in the Cariboo region on the traditional territories of the Secwépemc, Tŝilhqot'in, and Dakelh nations.

item.title: Arts, Culture And Digital Storytelling
item.description:
Riley and Casey explore technology and society in rural communities. Today's focus: Arts, Culture & Digital Storytelling.

NEWS ROUNDUP: We break down [All3DP] Is This New $189 "Smart Enclosure" the Missing Piece for Your Bambu Lab A1? and [XDA Developers] 6 self-hosted services I set up once and never think about, and explore what these developments mean for communities like ours.

RURAL CONNECTIONS: Deep dive on Arts, Culture & Digital Storytelling Topics include: connectivity, data sovereignty, AI, infrastructure, funding.

Hosts: Riley (Tech optimist with an engineering background) and Casey (Community-first skeptic of tech promises).

Sources discussed:

  • All3DP: [All3DP] Is This New $189 "Smart Enclosure" the Missing Piec...
  • XDA Developers: [XDA Developers] 6 self-hosted services I set up once and ne...
  • Seeded Content: Vodafone and Tiami turn ordinary phones into real-time radar...

Additional sources provided:

  • Quesnel Cariboo Observer: [Quesnel Cariboo Observer] Friday night lights and 1,700 bur...
  • Design News: [Design News] 3D Printing Shifts from Prototyping to Product...
  • 3D Printing Industry: [3D Printing Industry] MANUFACTURA's CORNCRETL Offers a Sust...
  • 3Druck.com: [3Druck.com] Divergent combines design, metal 3D printing an...
  • How-To Geek: [How-To Geek] My old Kindle was gathering dust until I turne...
  • Marine Insight: [Marine Insight] World’s First 3D-Printed Monolithic Catamar...
  • Williams Lake Tribune: [Williams Lake Tribune] Summerlanders puzzled by proliferati...
  • Williams Lake Tribune: [Williams Lake Tribune] WOLF: Does anyone else regularly rea...

Credits
Theme Song: Cariboo Signals by Sumo AI
Content Curation & Script: Claude (Anthropic)
TTS Voices: OpenAI TTS API
Cover Art: ChatGPT (OpenAI)
Podcast Coordination: Erich Zirnhelt
© 2026 Erich Zirnhelt. Licensed under CC BY-NC 4.0.

item.title: Resilient Rural Futures
item.description:
Riley and Casey explore technology and society in rural communities. Today's focus: Resilient Rural Futures.

NEWS ROUNDUP: We break down [Resilience.org] Small-scale supply chains in action, and explore what these developments mean for communities like ours.

RURAL CONNECTIONS: Deep dive on Resilient Rural Futures Topics include: broadband, fiber, connectivity, telemedicine, AI.

Hosts: Riley (Tech optimist with an engineering background) and Casey (Community-first skeptic of tech promises).

Sources discussed:

  • Resilience.org: [Resilience.org] Small-scale supply chains in action
  • Quesnel Cariboo Observer: [Quesnel Cariboo Observer] Uber coming to 100 Mile House thi...

Additional sources provided:

  • Al Jazeera English: [Al Jazeera English] Cuba: Technological Disobedience
  • XDA Developers: [XDA Developers] This device running ESPHome quietly runs my...
  • NYT Top Stories: [NYT Top Stories] The Secret of How Ukraine’s Lifesaving Air...
  • The Tech Buzz: [The Tech Buzz] Google locks in 1.9GW clean energy deal with...
  • XDA Developers: [XDA Developers] I turned my old phone into a sound sensor, ...
  • Williams Lake Tribune: [Williams Lake Tribune] Business leaders give B.C. budget un...
  • XDA Developers: [XDA Developers] Home Assistant's latest beta finally turns ...
  • My Cariboo Now: [My Cariboo Now] Emergency Services at 100 Mile District Gen...

Credits
Theme Song: Cariboo Signals by Sumo AI
Content Curation & Script: Claude (Anthropic)
TTS Voices: OpenAI TTS API
Cover Art: ChatGPT (OpenAI)
Podcast Coordination: Erich Zirnhelt
© 2026 Erich Zirnhelt. Licensed under CC BY-NC 4.0.

item.title: Cariboo Voices And Local News
item.description:
Riley and Casey explore technology and society in rural communities. Today's focus: Cariboo Voices & Local News.

NEWS ROUNDUP: We break down [Williams Lake Tribune] B.C. school trustee Laurie Throness resigns after $750K hate-speech ruling for Barry Neufeld and [Williams Lake Tribune] Clearwater RCMP respond to criticism of intimate partner violence reduction target, plus 1 more stories, and explore what these developments mean for communities like ours.

RURAL CONNECTIONS: Deep dive on Cariboo Voices & Local News Topics include: broadband, fiber, connectivity, AI, infrastructure.

Hosts: Riley (Tech optimist with an engineering background) and Casey (Community-first skeptic of tech promises).

Sources discussed:

  • Williams Lake Tribune: [Williams Lake Tribune] B.C. school trustee Laurie Throness ...
  • Williams Lake Tribune: [Williams Lake Tribune] Clearwater RCMP respond to criticism...
  • My Cariboo Now: [My Cariboo Now] Avalanche conditions “considered dangerous”...
  • My Cariboo Now: [My Cariboo Now] It’s the 19th year for Pink Shirt/anti-bull...
  • My Cariboo Now: [My Cariboo Now] Pretrail set for Lac La Hache man facing fi...
  • My Cariboo Now: [My Cariboo Now] Would You Rather Sweepstakes 2026
  • CNET: [CNET] Best Rural Internet Providers for 2026
  • Williams Lake Tribune: [Williams Lake Tribune] Lake City Secondary student raising ...

Additional sources provided:

  • Quesnel Cariboo Observer: [Quesnel Cariboo Observer] Hometown Hero: Wells artist uses ...
  • Williams Lake Tribune: [Williams Lake Tribune] Escaped Alone on stage in Williams L...

Credits
Theme Song: Cariboo Signals by Sumo AI
Content Curation & Script: Claude (Anthropic)
TTS Voices: OpenAI TTS API
Cover Art: ChatGPT (OpenAI)

item.title: Wild Spaces And Outdoor Life
item.description:
Riley and Casey explore technology and society in rural communities. Today's focus: Wild Spaces & Outdoor Life.

NEWS ROUNDUP: We break down [My Cariboo Now] New paid on-call firefighters recruitment underway in Williams Lake and [Al Jazeera English] UN approves first carbon credits under Paris Agreement market mechanism, plus 1 more stories, and explore what these developments mean for communities like ours.

RURAL CONNECTIONS: Deep dive on Wild Spaces & Outdoor Life Topics include: broadband, satellite, data sovereignty, AI, infrastructure.

Hosts: Riley (Tech optimist with an engineering background) and Casey (Community-first skeptic of tech promises).

Sources discussed:

  • My Cariboo Now: [My Cariboo Now] New paid on-call firefighters recruitment u...

item.title: Indigenous Lands And Innovation
item.description:
Riley and Casey explore technology and society in rural communities. Today's focus: Indigenous Lands & Innovation.

NEWS ROUNDUP: We break down [Techzine Global] VAST Data leverages unique market position to develop full-stack AI infrastructure and [IndigiNews] Indigenous rights defenders say they’ll ‘not stay silent’ after anti-protest bylaw defeated in ‘Winnipeg’, plus 1 more stories, and explore what these developments mean for communities like ours.

RURAL CONNECTIONS: Deep dive on Indigenous Lands & Innovation Topics include: broadband, fiber, satellite, connectivity, data sovereignty.

Hosts: Riley (Tech optimist with an engineering background) and Casey (Community-first skeptic of tech promises).

Sources discussed:

  • Techzine Global: [Techzine Global] VAST Data leverages unique market position...
  • IndigiNews: [IndigiNews] Indigenous rights defenders say they’ll ‘not st...
  • Quesnel Cariboo Observer: [Quesnel Cariboo Observer] Cariboo Chilcotin mobile therapy ...
  • Global News: [Global News] Nationwide prescribed burn program being launc...

Additional sources provided:

  • Hackaday: [Hackaday] Meshtastic Does More Than Simple Communication
  • Engadget: [Engadget] How to send a message via satellite on iPhone
  • The Narwhal: [The Narwhal] B.C. moves at ‘warp speed’ to change landmark ...
  • Resilience.org: [Resilience.org] Agrihouse at the Venice Architecture Bienna...
  • Resilience.org: [Resilience.org] Black History Month: Land, Power, and the K...

Credits

item.title: Community Tech And Governance
item.description:
Riley and Casey explore technology and society in rural communities. Today's focus: Community Tech & Governance.

NEWS ROUNDUP: We break down [My Cariboo Now] B.C. leaders seek answers on OpenAI decision not to alert police ahead of Tumbler Ridge shooting and [Resilience.org] The Future is Rural: Reclaiming Food Sovereignty through Farming Clubs?, plus 1 more stories, and explore what these developments mean for communities like ours.

RURAL CONNECTIONS: Deep dive on Community Tech & Governance Topics include: broadband, fiber, renewable energy, solar, AI.

Hosts: Riley (Tech optimist with an engineering background) and Casey (Community-first skeptic of tech promises).

Sources discussed:

  • My Cariboo Now: [My Cariboo Now] B.C. leaders seek answers on OpenAI decisio...
  • Resilience.org: [Resilience.org] The Future is Rural: Reclaiming Food Sovere...
  • GN Clean Energy and EVs: [GN Clean Energy and EVs] Easee and Subaru complete solar-on...
  • Construction World: [Construction World] Human-Centred Governance As AI Scales I...
  • Quesnel Cariboo Observer: [Quesnel Cariboo Observer] Cariboo Regional District release...
  • AirQualityNews: [AirQualityNews] Solihull Council launches group-buying sola...

Additional sources provided:

  • Global News: [Global News] SaskPower looks to make province ‘energy power...
  • The Narwhal: [The Narwhal] A $10-billion AI data centre races ahead in a ...
  • The Verge: [The Verge] Taara Beam provides 25Gbps connectivity over inv...
  • Hackaday: [Hackaday] Meshtastic Does More Than Simple Communication
  • NYT Top Stories: [NYT Top Stories] The A.I. Evangelists on a Mission to Shake...

Credits
Theme Song: Cariboo Signals by Sumo AI
Content Curation & Script: Claude (Anthropic)

item.title: Working Lands And Industry
item.description:
Riley and Casey explore technology and society in rural communities. Today's focus: Working Lands & Industry.

NEWS ROUNDUP: We break down [The Tyee] Police Watchdog Finds Failures in Missing Indigenous Woman Case and [IBS Intelligence] Weak data infrastructure slows AI adoption, and explore what these developments mean for communities like ours.

RURAL CONNECTIONS: Deep dive on Working Lands & Industry Topics include: broadband, satellite, precision agriculture, solar, AI.

Hosts: Riley (Tech optimist with an engineering background) and Casey (Community-first skeptic of tech promises).

Sources discussed:

  • The Tyee: [The Tyee] Police Watchdog Finds Failures in Missing Indigen...
  • IBS Intelligence: [IBS Intelligence] Weak data infrastructure slows AI adoptio...
  • Neowin: [Neowin] Anthropic accuses China of 'industrial-scale' attem...

  • XDA Developers: [XDA Developers] Panasonic won't build its own TVs anymore a...

item.title: Arts, Culture And Digital Storytelling
item.description:
Riley and Casey explore technology and society in rural communities. Today's focus: Arts, Culture & Digital Storytelling.

NEWS ROUNDUP: We break down [The Tyee] Please Advise! Why Do Conservative MPs Keep Bolting? and [Hackaday] Panoramic Film Camera Made from 3D Printed Parts, and explore what these developments mean for communities like ours.

RURAL CONNECTIONS: Deep dive on Arts, Culture & Digital Storytelling Topics include: broadband, connectivity, AI, infrastructure, maintenance.

Hosts: Riley (Tech optimist with an engineering background) and Casey (Community-first skeptic of tech promises).

Sources discussed:

  • The Tyee: [The Tyee] Please Advise! Why Do Conservative MPs Keep Bolti...
  • Hackaday: [Hackaday] Panoramic Film Camera Made from 3D Printed Parts

  • Toms Guide: [Toms Guide] Netflix new releases — 5 shows and movies you n...
  • XDA Developers: [XDA Developers] Microsoft Copilot is the best productivity ...
  • Toms Guide: [Toms Guide] I use the 'empty chair' prompt to streamline my...
  • Al Jazeera English: [Al Jazeera English] ICC to hold hearings on charges against...
  • Android Authority: [Android Authority] Looks like Samsung’s Privacy Display tri...
  • Toms Guide: [Toms Guide] Why you should never water your peace lily with...
  • The Tyee: [The Tyee] Danielle Smith Is No Separatist. She’s Much Worse
  • The Tyee: [The Tyee] Elbows Up for Indigenous Rights
  • The Tyee: [The Tyee] BC Premier’s Office Sued over Firing of Employee ...

item.title: Resilient Rural Futures
item.description:
Riley and Casey explore technology and society in rural communities. Today's focus: Resilient Rural Futures.

NEWS ROUNDUP: We break down [Toms Guide] Experts explain why over 65s need this amount of sleep — and how to get it and [ScienceAlert] There's a Critical Thing You Can Do to Keep Alzheimer's Symptoms at Bay, plus 1 more stories, and explore what these developments mean for communities like ours.

RURAL CONNECTIONS: Deep dive on Resilient Rural Futures Topics include: broadband, AI, infrastructure, maintenance, funding.

Hosts: Riley (Tech optimist with an engineering background) and Casey (Community-first skeptic of tech promises).

Sources discussed:

  • Toms Guide: [Toms Guide] Experts explain why over 65s need this amount o...
  • ScienceAlert: [ScienceAlert] There's a Critical Thing You Can Do to Keep A...
  • Android Authority: [Android Authority] Jackery Explorer 5000 Plus deal: My favo...
  • BC Gov News: [BC Gov News] Adding three mining projects to Critical Miner...
  • Quesnel Cariboo Observer: [Quesnel Cariboo Observer] B.C. forests minister says the pr...

Additional sources provided:

  • WIRED: [WIRED] Government Docs Reveal New Details About Tesla and W...
  • InsideEVs: [InsideEVs] Exclusive: Nissan's Most Affordable EV Just Got ...
  • ZDNet: [ZDNet] You can control your Linux PC from your Android phon...
  • GN 3D Printing: [GN 3D Printing] Six Fault Lines That Will Reshape Additive ...
  • Quesnel Cariboo Observer: [Quesnel Cariboo Observer] Lost plate leads to 2 arrests and...
  • Quesnel Cariboo Observer: [Quesnel Cariboo Observer] Avalanche kills man heli-skiing i...

Credits
Theme Song: Cariboo Signals by Sumo AI
Content Curation & Script: Claude (Anthropic)
TTS Voices: OpenAI TTS API

Podcast Coordination: Erich Zirnhelt

item.title: Cariboo Voices And Local News
item.description:
Riley and Casey explore technology and society in rural communities. Today's focus: Cariboo Voices & Local News.

NEWS ROUNDUP: We break down [XDA Developers] KDE Plasma 6.7.0 will make managing your printers a lot easier and [The Economic Times] Odisha mobilises over 5,000 MSMEs in clean energy push at Global Cleantech Expo, plus 1 more stories, and explore what these developments mean for communities like ours.

RURAL CONNECTIONS: Deep dive on Cariboo Voices & Local News Topics include: satellite, telemedicine, AI, infrastructure, maintenance.

Hosts: Riley (Tech optimist with an engineering background) and Casey (Community-first skeptic of tech promises).

Sources discussed:

  • XDA Developers: [XDA Developers] KDE Plasma 6.7.0 will make managing your pr...
  • The Economic Times: [The Economic Times] Odisha mobilises over 5,000 MSMEs in cl...

  • Al Jazeera English: [Al Jazeera English] UK weighs removing ex-Prince Andrew fro...

  • TechRadar: [TechRadar] Forget solid-state batteries – researchers have ...
